name: Yellow Squash Stuffed with Meat & Gruyere Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground chuck and onions with salt and pepper.
2. Stir in tomato paste, sugar, and water. Simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and stir in cheese.
4. Cut squash into halves lengthwise; scoop out seeds with a spoon and discard.
5. Place squash halves cut side up in a 9 x 13-inch baking dish and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
6. Spoon the meat mixture into the squash halves.
7. Cover dish with foil and bake for 35 minutes at 375°F.
Serves: 5 to 6
Source: "Mountain Measures" --Junior League of Charleston, WV ed. 1974
